name: GOAL19 FINAL unified digital twin
score_note: zero q_offset (no per-trial fudge) — Phase 6 proved per-trial offsets unnecessary
jump_integrator_note: re-open (2026-07-03): RK4 chattered on stiff contact (0-130N GRF oscillation during push-off). implicitfast smooths GRF, total 15182->15121. h_ratio unchanged (0.563) => chattering was cosmetic, NOT the height limiter.
joint_flex_note: ★ re-open (2026-07-03): added knee transmission compliance (GOAL10 tau_scale-free precedent, springref=0). USER CHALLENGE was correct: prior no-tau_scale goal (GOAL10) reproduced jump height via joint flex, which GOAL19 had dropped. sk=1.15 is score-optimal. NOT a height fudge: summed jump rmse_q1 -49%, rmse_q2 -37%, rmse_dq1 -33%, rmse_dq2 -34%, dh -41% (q/dq AND height all improve). hip stiffness negligible (knee-only identical). Total 15121->11572 (-23.5%). Jump h_ratio 0.563->0.741.
grf_chatter_note: flex re-excites contact-solver GRF chatter (ΣGRFrmse 797->970). solref_tc 0.00217->0.005 smooths it (->675, below pre-flex baseline) at +3% total, h unchanged. NOT applied here (manual override); TODO joint re-opt of (stiff_knee, solref_tc, imp0, m_foot_ex) since old contact was fit without flex.
